programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que nuevas pruebas revelen que el asesino de Puerto a Puerto se ha infiltrado en la agencia, los equipos del NCIS siguen todas las pistas en una carrera por localizarlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En el final de la octava temporada, las vidas de los miembros del NCIS corren peligro cuando se enfrentan cara a cara con el infame asesino de Puerto a Puerto.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un nuevo comienzo
programme.desc: Erin se siente abrumada por la culpa después de que un hombre al que liberó es acusado de matar a un policía.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ayúdame a ayudarte
programme.desc: Linda pide a Danny y Báez que ayuden a su compañera de trabajo, quien está teniendo problemas con su exmarido enfurecido.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amigos en necesidad
programme.desc: Jamie y Danny difieren en cómo manejar a un novato imprudente del NYPD, Marcus, hijo de un amigo de Danny. Mientras tanto, Erin investiga una mala inversión en la que se vio envuelto su investigador, Anthony, por culpa de su primo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ciudad despiadada
programme.desc: Frank y Danny colaboran para ayudar a Nick Constantine, un exconvicto rehabilitado que Frank había encarcelado años atrás, cuando Constantine se ve implicado en el asesinato de un viejo enemigo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: A medida que el UAC concluye una investigación sobre apuñalamientos inusuales en el estado de Nueva York, la visita de Morgan a un sobreviviente podría descubrir más preguntas que quedan para que el equipo responda.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los cuerpos de dos víctimas de asesinato se encuentran en una comunidad de West Virginia, el UAC descubre una disputa latente desde hacía tiempo entre dos familias, y se debe investigar cuál de ellos podría ser responsable de la muerte.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros dirigidos cerca de Memphis tiene la BAU en busca de una coincidencia entre las personas desaparecidas y un motivo que les llevará al sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas son encontradas muertas por envenenamiento con arsénico en Long Beach, California, amenazas de muerte escritas a mano y otras pistas hacen que la UAC busque a un sujeto fascinado con la mitología griega.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El asesinato de un teniente de la Marina es grabado por una cámara de seguridad del Pentágono; Gibbs revela que la agente Barrett y su equipo se harán cargo de un caso relacionado con un asesino en serie.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que el ex compañero de Tony, Danny Price, aparezca como la última víctima del Asesino Puerto a Puerto, éste revisa sus días como detective en Baltimore, incluyendo su primer encuentro con Gibbs.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que nuevas pruebas revelen que el asesino de Puerto a Puerto se ha infiltrado en la agencia, los equipos del NCIS siguen todas las pistas en una carrera por localizarlo.

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: Jared enjoys some new, expensive toys, the girls take Wendy out for a night on the town, and Doug takes care of the kids for the weekend.

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: Jared throws a fundraiser for his sick friend Cooda. Doug volunteers himself for a bachelor auction, and Mason gets wrongfully grounded.

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: Doug takes the guys to the Super Bowl of single life: Spring Break! They convince the girls they're headed to a vineyard, but after a few drinks, their lies start to unravel.

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: Doug crashes at Tommy and Tammy's and shares a bunk bed with Hunter. Chris goes overboard at a storage auction, and Jared tries to make the next big internet video.

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: Chris and Aimee try to spice up their love life. Jared opens a Haunted Frog Gigging Tour, and Wendy goes on a date!

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: Doug and Wendy co-host a birthday party for Presley. Chris puts Mason through a boot camp, and Jared wins a timeshare!

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: Jared's dream vacation turns into a nightmare when the family first gets to the Bahamas and sees a side of the island far different than the brochures.

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: The family gets settled into their new Bahamas villa and Jared uses the home owner card to get onto a mega yacht.

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: The family's local friend takes them on a day trip to a deserted island, only they get stranded there for the night!

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: The family's Bahamas vacation is coming to an end, but not before a huge surprise visit from Wendy, Christian, and Shane and some close encounters with sharks.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin kicks off season three with eight badasses who will go head to head in three bust ass challenges. The last man standing will earn the right to take on the Skullbuster for a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin invites eight hardcore female athletes to visit the ranch to battle through Snatch, Water Logged and The Crate before one competitor gets her shot at the Skullbuster and $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight tough-as-nails athletes are ready to throw down. But will they have what it takes to get through Trench Warfare, Pole Dancer and Chain Gang?

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight rough and tough female athletes must face off in Trench Warfare, Pole Dancer and Chain Gang before they get a chance at the Skullbuster and a shot at $10,000 if they can beat the current benchmark time.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight male athletes compete in Summit, High & Dry and Cranked for a chance to win $10,000. Who will outlast his competition and challenge the toughest course in America?

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight new female competitors try and prove they are the toughest badass in the country by taking on Summit, High & Dry and Cranked. The winner moves on to face the Skullbuster and a chance at Steve Austin's $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight men come to the Broken Skull Ranch to battle one another in Rip Off, Loaded and Dead Weight. But will the last man standing defeat the Skullbuster and walk away with the $10,000?

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies find a child in the backseat of a hit-and-run suspect's car, officers respond to a shoplifting call, and a man calls the cops over his stepson's erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police have a breakthrough in a burglary case, a man found with drugs in his pants claims the pants are not his, and officers deal with a familiar domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A police pursuit of a truck leaving a known drug location ends in a crash, undercover officers move in for a drug bust, and a man recklessly fires his handgun in the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A K-9 unit assists on a motorcycle pursuit turned foot chase gone awry. Officers investigate after noticing the garage door to an auto body shop is open. A pursuit involving a stolen vehicle driving on the wrong side of the freeway ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver foot bails from a still-rolling van and hides nearby. A teen on a dirt bike refuses to stop for Deputies. A man attempts to run from a traffic stop but gets hung up on a fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers give chase to a suspect driving a stolen vehicle. A biohazard bin an illegal knife and drugs are found during a traffic stop. Agents go undercover in an area known for heavy drug activity.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police track a vehicle leaving a known drug house, officers sort out the facts of a domestic disturbance call, and a daughter trashes her parents' house and threatens police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a bizarre slow-speed chase after a suspect’s failure to stop. A woman is pulled over after leaving a known drug house. An officer pursues two illegal drag racers on a public highway.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pair of suspects on the run pretend they were busy napping. A man reaches for something in his pocket, but denies knowing what it is. A family calls the police after their roommate brandishes a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man pulls out all the stops to elude the police, a civilian steps in when she spots a violent crime in progress, and a suspected shoplifter is confronted by officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A little rain doesn’t stop a determined quad driver from trying to outrun police. A deputy has doubts about a man’s professed distrust of banks. A man ignores obvious red flags when buying a moped and ends up paying the price.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a dirt bike tries to elude police while dumping his firearm, and after breaking up a parking lot drug deal, an officer advises a young suspect to make better choices.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver and his wife in a high-speed chase, a paranoid man vandalizes his roommate's car, and a shoplifter can't keep her story straight.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in possession of a stolen car explains his unique nickname to deputies. Police go to the same house twice in under 30 minutes to sort out a messy marital spat. A mom with multiple priors is caught in a bind.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A generous boyfriend steps in to prevent his girlfriend from going to jail. Officers save a kitten who wants to hide in a dangerous place. A man says he’s been driving a stolen truck for one day, but he’s off by a few months.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a man suspected of robbery. A riot erupts at a juvenile party on the beach. Officers find an intoxicated man stuck on an iron fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A lawbreaker tries to convince the cops that he's a good guy, and deputies smell trouble during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the death of a first class passenger on a flight to Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate a bug riddled body found in the desert. Warrick and Catherine look into the theft of some valuable art.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a supermarket. In the store, Grissom finds a bathroom stall door that claims five women have been killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man about to go on trial for arson and the murder of his wife and child seeks assistance from Grissom to help prove his innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A bomb goes off in an office building, killing one and injuring many more. The chief suspect is a security guard who left minutes before the explosion and has knowledge in bomb making.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a single human bone is discovered in the desert, Grissom and Catherine must cover miles of territory to find the rest of the skeleton.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: At a swanky fundraiser, attended by the sheriff, a woman turns up dead in the pool.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a mall parking garage. She's raped, beaten, shot and left for dead. Sara collects evidence from her and grows attached to her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A body is found in a pottery store in what's apparently a robbery that was interrupted.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A couple leaving a restaurant on their anniversary are killed in the street and their car is stolen. The crime scene is compromised when it rains shortly after the CSIs arrive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire team investigates the abduction of the infant child of a well-to-do family. Suspicion immediately falls on the child's parents.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two teenage girls run over a deaf man with their car, but they didn't kill him - he was already dead.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Warrick take the case of a jogger who was killed by a wild animal in the park. It gets complicated when they discover that the jogger had his liver removed after he was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: On the day Grissom has to evaluate his team, a head is found in the trunk of a car. While Gil and Catherine work on the head, Sara and Nick investigate a body in the desert that's missing its head.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una mujer aparece asesinada en su casa. Su parecido con Sara hace que Grissom se interese personalmente por el caso y le obliga a examinar las decisiones que ha tomado en su vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Nick responden a una electrocución en un casino. El casino alberga antigüedades japonesas. La electrocución no es más que una treta para robar la pieza central de la exposición.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un robo en una tienda de comestibles acaba en un tiroteo que deja cinco muertos. El policía cree que Grissom le guarda rencor.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Todo el equipo debe investigar un crimen en el que un marido y su esposa, estrella del porno, fueron asesinados al estilo ejecución.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine y Sara se enfrentan a la muerte de lo que al principio parece ser un travesti.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un cuerpo femenino mutilado es descubierto atado a los bajos de un autobús que transporta presas de un correccional de mujeres, después de que un brazo amputado salga volando de debajo del vehículo y golpee un coche.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un violento asesinato en el aparcamiento de un casino y otro episodio en la sala de interrogatorios de la policía llevan a los CSI a un sorprendente descubrimiento tras otro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick, Catherine y Nick intentan determinar la causa del incendio de una casa en el que muere una adolescente. El incendio se produce en el mismo barrio que otro incendio provocado similar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine y Nick investigan la muerte de un corredor durante una competición. Mientras tanto, Sara y Warrick investigan la muerte de una pareja en una habitación de hotel, que inicialmente se pensó que había sido un asesinato-suicidio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una montaña rusa se sale de la vía y deja seis muertos. El equipo de CSI investiga si se trata de un accidente o de juego sucio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes aparecen asesinados tras estafar a los casinos de Sam Braun.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una empleada de un casino es golpeada y violada cuando vuelve a casa del trabajo, pero sobrevive e identifica a su agresor.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Las fuertes lluvias en Las Vegas arrastran un cadáver por las alcantarillas. Mientras el equipo investiga, encuentran huesos en el alcantarillado que solo podrían ser de un asesinato.

programme.desc: When a skydiver is murdered, the CSIs discover that he has more than 100 children and all of them are suspects.

programme.desc: When the sisters of a Miami sorority are knocked off one by one, the CSIs try to end the murder spree.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When one of the CSI's biggest enemies is murdered, Horatio must determine which of his team members is a suspect.

programme.desc: When a rape and a murder takes place on a Miami beach, Horatio and the team are sent to investigate the mansion of the Hamilton family.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When his mentor is killed while defusing a bomb, Horatio goes on a personal mission to find the culprit. Megan wonders if he is too close to the case.

programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el aparente asesinato de una universitaria, mientras que Delko tiene misteriosas visiones del difunto Tim Speedle.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Asesinan a una leyenda del deporte y la investigación se complica cuando el laboratorio pierde el cuerpo. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una modelo se electrocuta en la pasarela, el caso lleva a Horatio y al equipo de CSI de vuelta al hijo de Horatio y a su archienemigo.

programme.desc: Cuando unas vacaciones familiares se vuelven mortales, el equipo de CSI debe encontrar al asesino antes de que los supervivientes hagan justicia por mano propia.

programme.desc: Cuando una ametralladora rara e ilegal evapora a tres contrabandistas de armas, el equipo de CSI debe encontrar al asesino antes de que el arma cause más muertes.

programme.desc: La ex de Horatio, y madre de Kyle, resurge en Miami como la viuda de un multimillonario que hará cualquier cosa para recuperar a su hijo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan un asesinato en una boda, las pistas finalmente llevan a los CSI a un club de striptease local.

programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators discovers DNA that contradicts a murder case that was seemingly open and shut before.

programme.desc: The CSI New York team follows up on a 911 call to a vacant penthouse but finds a nearly 100-Year-Old corpse and a booby-trapped house.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.desc: Gillespie is reunited with his daughter Lana, when she comes to Sparta to settle her inheritance, but she’s been followed by her mother’s ex-boyfriend, who claims that it all belongs to him, and he’s willing to take drastic measures to collect.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.desc: When the drowned body of Rebecca Lewis is found washed up on a riverbank, her friend and Tibbs’ law school buddy, Mark Meyers is the prime suspect based on an eyewitness account. He’s arrested for murder, but Tibbs doesn’t think that Mark is guilty.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: 22-year-old Vernetta says 55-year-old Ronnie is her son's father and lied about his age when they hooked up! Next, is Krystal sleeping with her own relatives? Could their kids not be his? Plus, Keke returns to tell Tyrone a secret!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Wild Results ... Where Are They Now?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Will 25-year-old Katrina prove that 50-year-old Christopher fathered her baby and silence his new fiancé Suprina? Is Johnny or a married man the father of Sarah’s baby? Plus, Robert denies fathering 2 women’s babies!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: We'll revisit the wildest and most outrageous teens! 19-year old Tay slept with Kyle once and got pregnant. Then, wild party girl Hanna, met John when she was 19 and cheated on him twice, both times when she conceived her 2 kids. Who are the dads?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Jennifer needed a ride, but found love instead. But is her man Clarence using his taxi for picking up other women? Then, Lisa and her son Shawn think that David is cheating on her and want him out of their lives?

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.desc: En la escena de un asesinato horrible, el asesino se esforzó mucho para poder borrar sus huellas dactilares y oscurecer las huellas de zapatos que dejó cuando arrastraba los rastros de sangre en el piso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Avis Banks y su hijo no nacido fueron brutalmente asesinados. El cuerpo fue descubierto por su prometido Keyon Pittman. La policía se enteró de que Pittman estaba teniendo aventuras con otras mujeres y se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las zonas rurales de Canadá, el Dr. John Schneeberger es acusado de sedar y agredir sexualmente a una de sus pacientes y a su hijastra. Las pruebas de ADN demuestran que el doctor es inocente, pero la paciente insiste en que la sedó y violó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Impresiones fuertes
programme.desc: La esposa de un oficial de la Fuerza Aérea fue encontrada muerta en su cama con una bolsa plástica de lavandería cerca de su rostro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2004, la estudiante de enfermería Tamika Huston desapareció de su hogar en Spartanburg, Carolina del Sur. Una pista llevó a los detectives a su auto y encontraron una llave de una casa desconocida que podría ayudar a resolver el caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: De fotografía
programme.desc: Una adolescente de Modesto, California desapareció. No había señales de lucha en su casa y la policía sospechaba que ella simplemente se había escapado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, April Loveless, de 4 años, fue encontrada muerta en el patio trasero de su casa en Texas. Sus padres le dijeron a la policía que fue atacada y asesinada por perros salvajes. Los investigadores no estuvieron de acuerdo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompiendo el molde
programme.desc: El hijo de tres años de unos padres de Dripping Springs, Texas, desarrolla una condición respiratoria.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Firme aquí
programme.desc: Una madre de dos hijos desaparece después de salir de compras. Su cuerpo es encontrado un mes después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las primeras horas de la mañana, justo antes de Navidad, una estudiante universitaria fue secuestrada del estacionamiento de su departamento. Su cuerpo fue encontrado más tarde ese día. Ella había sido agredida sexualmente y fue disparada a quemarropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Nadie en una tranquila comunidad residencial vio nada inusual el día en que uno de sus vecinos fue brutalmente atacado y asesinado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La hija de Paul Gruber sospechaba que algo malo estaba ocurriendo cuando recibió unas tarjetas de regalo enviadas de parte de su padre, pero escritas con la letra de una persona extraña.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las cámaras de seguridad en un casino rastrearon los movimientos de una joven poco antes de que desapareciera. Nunca se le volvió a ver, pero a través de la evidencia que dejó, pudo decírsele a los investigadores qué le sucedió y quién fue el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los excursionistas cerca de Anchorage, Alaska, descubrieron un cuerpo envuelto en sábanas con bordes de costura naranja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1997, se encontró el carro de Kelly Eckart, con todas sus pertenencias aún dentro del mismo, después de haber trabajado un turno nocturno en Franklin, Indiana. Días más tarde, se encontró su cuerpo en un barranco aislado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de una Convención de Filadelfia, 180 legionarios contraen síntomas similares a la neumonía y 29 de ellos mueren. La determinación de un científico ayuda a identificar la causa de esta enfermedad mortal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La noche del 22 de Mayo de 1992, Betty Wilson regresó a casa después de una reunión y descubrió a su esposo tirado en un charco de sangre. Era evidente que Jack Wilson había sido asesinado – pero ¿cómo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de un día de pesca en un tranquilo pueblo de Suiza, un adolescente no regresa a casa como se planeó. La investigación revela algunas evidencias microscópicas importantes en el agua cerca de donde fue visto por última vez.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Destinado a la cárcel
programme.desc: Una mujer es encontrada muerta en un barranco, pero las fuertes tormentas habían arrastrado pruebas cruciales de la escena del crimen. En dos ocasiones, el rastro se estancó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Esta examinación del papel que juegan las autopsias en las investigaciones de asesinatos se centra en la sospechosa muerte de Virginia Ridley.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, la oficial de la correccional de New York, Donna Payant, desapareció y luego fue encontrada en un vertedero. El médico forense no solo identificó la causa de la muerte, sino que también encontró una pista importante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece sin dejar rastro. A pesar de que se sospecha de un juego sucio, las pistas no funcionan y la investigación se estanca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Judy Southern llegó a casa del trabajo y recibió un disparo de un hombre armado que esperaba dentro. Su esposo llegó poco después, llamó a los servicios de emergencia y la llevó al hospital.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, en Grand Junction, Colorado suceden una serie de bombardeos que matan a dos personas y lastiman a uno más. La policía corre para poder encontrar al culpable antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando el número y volumen de manchas de sangre es mayor que la habitual en la escena del crimen, es el trabajo de los científicos forenses el determinar el por qué.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray fue acusada de la muerte de su esposo. Su hijo estaba tan convencido de su inocencia que se matriculó en la facultad de derecho, estudió todas las pruebas y, finalmente, descubrió la verdad de lo que realmente sucedió entre sus padres.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Sony Avalos says she's one of Deal or No Deal's biggest fans and knows how to play the game better than anyone.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: JT has got his license. He’s got a steady girlfriend in Liberty, who happens to be Student Council President. So why is he feeling anything but a “man”? Because Liberty’s in control.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After all the craziness of last year, Craig has one overriding goal: no drama. He’s focused on his friends, his family, his studies, and his band – a reconstituted Downtown Sasquatch but no Spinner - a new addition is rocking the drum-kit…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After proving he’s still got talent on the hardwood, Jimmy is invited to try out for the Wheelchair Basketball Association’s Junior Team. It’s Jimmy’s second chance at athletic stardom, and an opportunity to make his father proud.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Liberty’s pregnancy enters its sixth month, she and JT are forced to face reality: even though no longer a couple, they have to deal with the pregnancy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate for cash, JT has stolen drugs from the pharmacy… He becomes entangled in a web between his boss, the drug dealer, and the police.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Someone’s definitely interested in Marco. But as it turns out, Tim is interested in Marco, but not for the expected reason. Tim knows Marco is gay, and has been struggling with how to come out to his friends and family.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The one-year anniversary of the school shooting is approaching and everyone’s feeling the weight of it. Not least of whom is Spinner Mason, still persona non grata.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight is the premiere of “Jay and Silent Bob Go Canadian, Eh” and with many of the students and faculty on the guest list, it’s like the whole school is gripped in movie premiere fever!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige wakes Alex up in her bed – Paige spent the night on the floor – and as the two girls awkwardly prepare for school, they try to avoid the elephant in the room. As in, that they KISSED last night. What happened?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig bursts into rehearsal with the good news – they’ve been accepted to perform at a Northern Sounds Showcase. The band is NOT so into it at first – music is Craig’s dream, not theirs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since being "saved" everything has been going Spinner's way: he's made a good friend in Friendship Club leader Linus; his relationship with Darcy has been going strong, and his recent interest in improving school life has been getting him noticed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Simpson-Nelson household is in chaos. With Snake gone and Spike totally down in the dumps, keeping the household together has fallen totally onto Emma’s shoulders.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is finally getting some control over her life. Snake and Spike are back together, she’s been running every day, and she’s barely eating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Facing the pressure of year-end exams, the furthest thing from Marco’s mind is what happened a year ago – when Dylan stomped all over his heart. Marco takes this as a sign that he’s over Dylan for good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The end of another school year finds Darcy’s faith – in her boyfriend – being put to the test. When she discovers that Spinner has a past, Darcy grapples with a harsh reality of teen romance: jealousy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Peter receives a new car for his birthday, he quickly becomes a frequent face in the street racing scene.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things heat up between Emma and Sean – and when she takes time off from Peter to consider her relationship with Sean, Peter takes action – and Sean winds up expelled from Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is happy that the racing debacle is behind them, and that Peter is finally free if you don’t count the house arrest and five hundred hours of community service.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy starts the year off with big plans, coaching the girl’s junior basketball team and he is determined to take his relationship with Ashley to the next level. But can Jimmy handle the realities of his sexual future?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter, hoping to join the Spirit Squad, links Darcy’s personal web page to his. Darcy is thrilled with all the attention and hits she gets, and even posts some racy pictures of the Spirit Squad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Darcy’s online admirers take up more and more of her time, and her relationship with Spinner suffers. As Darcy posts increasingly sexy photos of herself, she’s surprised when her favourite online fan decides to introduce himself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Career Aptitude test results come in, Spinner is less than pleased with his results, and in desperation, convinces Jimmy to go into business selling T-shirts adorned with Jimmy’s illustrations.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being released from jail, Sean finds himself sleeping on Spike & Snake’s couch. Sean is focusing on putting the last few months behind him, getting a great job and being a fantastic boyfriend to Emma.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back in town for a music festival – and Manny can’t help picking up right where they left off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie thinks all Craig’s bad behaviour is due to Manny – to help him, she’s determined to stay by his side while he’s in town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s intent on getting over Craig, and uses Liberty’s upcoming birthday as an excuse to throw a party at Emma’s house while Spike and Snake are out of town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In shock after over JT’s death, Toby turns to Liberty, convinced that his somber funeral isn’t what JT would’ve wanted. Liberty agrees, and the two grief-stricken friends plan to throw a celebratory memorial for JT at Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: The Making Of: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Animatronics, computer animation and science re-create the dinosaurs' world.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: In 2000, scientists made a groundbreaking discovery, explaining how birds evolved from dinosaurs. However, a deeper investigation put a question mark over everything.

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring a dinosaur graveyard in Patagonia to gain a better understanding of dinosaur evolution, particularly the Middle Jurassic period when they became gigantic.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of the discovery and reconstruction in Argentina of the world's largest known dinosaur, a brand new species of titanosaur. Measuring 37m long, it now holds the record as the biggest animal ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the newfound remains of a dinosaur species considered the biggest carnivore in history, all while posing the question whether they engaged in a fight against the Argentinasaurus.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A surprising natural history of the Grand Canyon, from dinosaurs to today.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve is going large as he focuses on the biggest animals to have ever walked the earth. In his dino-den, he starts by meeting the Argentinosaurus, an animal so large that even its poo was deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic was home to the most vicious and violent predators the world has ever seen. To survive, herbivores had to fight back. Steve Backshall goes on a mission to track down the deadliest of all dinosaur defenders.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve tries to chomp through a car like a T-rex, wield an axe like an Allosaurus and hitch a ride in Britain's biggest tank to showcase the might of a Spinosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve gets freaky on a mission to find the weirdest dinosaur ever. He kick-starts with a Gigantoraptor, an 8 metre tall giant that laid the biggest eggs in history.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve discovers just what it takes to be a terror from the skies. He straps himself into one of Britain's fastest wind tunnels where he goes head to head against Microraptor.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve travels to new depths as he discovers just what it takes to be an aquatic terror. His quest sees him rocket through water in spectacular style, just like an Opthalmosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve's on a mission to find dinosaurs that have something a little special: fearsome killers, with incredible abilities! Get ready for a sensory sensation! His quest sees him race in the dark like a Troodon.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve goes on an undercover mission to unearth the sneakiest dinosaurs that were far deadlier than they first appeared.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall is on the hunt for the most deadly animals to have ever walked the earth, dinosaurs. Steve goes on a mission to uncover what was deadlier than the dinosaurs, from monsoons and super-sized sandstorms to ballistic bacteria and gory gas.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall looks back at the most awesome experiments over the series and chooses his highlights.

programme.title: The Mystery of Rome's X Tomb
programme.desc: Dr Michael Scott investigates the secrets of a tomb containing over 2,000 bodies in one of the catacombs of Rome.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: The Doctor is free to roam space and time again, but having planned to visit Metebelis Three, the Doctor and Jo actually find themselves stowaways aboard a ship in the 1920s, heading for Bombay.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo realise that they are actually trapped in a loop on a miniaturised version of Earth in which the other ship passengers endlessly repeat their actions.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: Having escaped from the ship, the Doctor and Jo find themselves stuck inside the workings of a giant machine. Can they find their way out?

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: The Doctor is reunited with the TARDIS and now full size, but Jo is still trapped within the machine. When the Doctor meets the operators of the Scope he learms that Jo is in grave danger.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo land on a spaceship in the far future as it is attacked by Ogrons, which the human crew see as Draconians. The Doctor and Jo are taken to Earth as spies.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: Neither the humans nor the Draconians are willing to believe the Doctor and Jo's story that someone is deliberately attempting to provoke a war between Earth and Draconia.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: Accused of being a spy, the Doctor is sentenced to imprisonment on the Moon while Jo is taken into the custody of an old enemy.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo are the Master's prisoners. In a bid to escape, the Doctor makes a dangerous spacewalk.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: On Draconia, the Doctor reveals the Master's plan to provoke war to the Draconian Emperor. But the Master escapes, taking Jo as a hostage.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: The Doctor leads a mission to the Ogron home world to apprehend the Master and rescue Jo. But the Master is in league with some old enemies of the Doctor.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: Injured by an Orgron gun, the Doctor asks the Time Lords to send the TARDIS after the Daleks. Leaving him asleep, Jo goes to explore the planet Spirodon.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor recovers from his coma and befriends a Thal expedition but is captured by the Daleks and taken to their base. Then a second Thal expedition arrives with terrible news.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: In Dalek city, the Doctor breaks out of his prison cell and joins forces with the Thals. With the Daleks in pursuit, the Doctor is forced to improvise a daring escape plan.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor and the Thals escape from the Dalek city and the Doctor is delighted to find that Jo is alive. The Daleks are preparing a deadly bacteria to kill all life on the planet.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: Desperate to prevent the Daleks from releasing their plague, the Doctor, Jo and the Thals infiltrate the Dalek base. But the Daleks detect the intruders!

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: A force of ten thousand Daleks are coming to life below the surface of Spiridon. The Doctor and the Thals must find a way to defeat the Daleks before they invade the galaxy.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Green Death
programme.desc: In Wales, a dead miner is found glowing green. UNIT investigates and Jo empathizes with the environmentalism of Cliff Jones who is opposing the pollution from Global Chemicals.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Green Death
programme.desc: Investigating the old mine workings, Jo and the miner, Bert, become trapped beneath the surface when the lift is sabotaged. Bert touches some green slime and becomes infected.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Green Death
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo discover the mine’s terrible secret. Global Chemicals’ managing director, Stevens is determined that they won’t live to reveal what they have learnt.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Green Death
programme.desc: The Brigadier attempts to seal the giant maggots in the mine with explosives, but this only results in the creatures burrowing to the surface.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Green Death
programme.desc: Captain Mike Yates is taken over by the supercomputer, BOSS and ordered to kill the Doctor. Cliff and Jo are trapped by the maggots as UNIT launch their attack.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Green Death
programme.desc: Cliff is dying, and maggots are on the verge of transforming into giant flying insects. Time is running out for the Doctor as BOSS launches its plan for world domination.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Time Warrior
programme.desc: A group of scientists are kidnapped by an alien from the past.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Time Warrior
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that the alien is a Sontaran warrior called Linx.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Time Warrior
programme.desc: Linx is providing advanced weaponry to Irongron and his men.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Time Warrior
programme.desc: His ship repaired, Linx prepares to take off as the Doctor races to stop history changing.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Invasion of the Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Doctor and Sarah return in the TARDIS to present-day London but are mystified when they find the city completely deserted.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Pointer mix is fixated on pinecones, while an Australian shepherd whines every time his owner switches on the vacuum cleaner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Young fans Jessica and Rachel join Cesar as he deals with a tiny dog with an outsized personality and a nervous pit bull mix afraid of the sea.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps owners of rescue dogs including a terrier mix that screams and a Belgian Tervuren scared of her own home; Cesar helps a family adopting their first dog.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar travels to the U.K. to help troubled dog owners with a territorial street dog and a dalmatian whose personality can turn ugly.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: British problem dogs including wild German Shepherds, a dog that must be muzzled by court order, and an English cocker spaniel that hates cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Problem dogs in the U.K. including two dogs that spent most of their lives in Africa, and a barking Jack Russell terrier mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar's English adventure ends with an aggressive klee kai, a collie mix that hates walks, and a hyper Labrador.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar brings discipline to four chaotic Chinese crested dogs, an over-energetic mastiff mix and two unruly miniature dachshunds.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps the lead singer of Rooney with his aggressive pit bull, while writer and producer Paul needs help with his two Boston terriers.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Playboy Playmates, Miss February 2010 is having trouble with her Chichuahua, while Orange County, Miss September 2011 with her terrier pug mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps comedians Skyler Stone, Ralphie May and Paul Rodriguez get to grips with their unruly hounds.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps dogs overcome their fears including a whippet mix who is blind and deaf, a labradoodle that fears the ocean, and a cocker spaniel that fears all humans.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Millan investigates the case of a bulldog named Bella who has become aggressive ever since her owner's five-month rehab stint.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A professional dog groomer reaches out to Cesar for help with three of her toughest clients; Cesar helps a couple with their head-strong pitbull.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town, the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today, and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The team whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in Denver helping Bobby Brown to track down a fugitive with a long rap sheet. But, unfortunately, they have no picture of the felon to work with, so the challenges are big on this one. But, Dog discovers a new source; "Facebook".

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Colorado, Dog's on the hunt for a runner with more than a decade's worth of trouble with the law. But the fugitive's friends and family are reluctant to help Dog bring him in.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After releasing the second part of his autobiography, Dog and his family traveled across America, and this very special episode offers an intimate portrait of both the public and private moments of that journey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Colorado chasing a young man with a taste for trouble. He's fled to Texas but with his family's house on the line Dog is willing to try a risky strategy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's hunt takes Dog far from the glittering hotels of Waikiki to the parts of Hawaii tourist rarely see, Oahu's ramshackle tent cities. The team searches for a woman who has lost almost everything, her home, her family and her spirit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's good friend and fellow bondsman Chris is running out of time. He has only days to find his fugitive or risk losing his business. In his hunt, Dog confronts duplicitous tipsters, vicious attack dogs, and hostile neighbors.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The bounty-hunter adventures of Duane "Dog" Chapman and his Posse are chronicled in this one hour "Best Of" special, featuring superlative memorable moments from the previous seven seasons.

programme.title: 10 Puppies And Us
programme.desc: In this episode we meet Chihuahua Chloe, setting up residence in an East London nail salon. She arrives and immediately wants to befriend 10-year-old Rocky, formerly the top dog in the household, but Rocky's not interested.

programme.title: Puppy Love
programme.desc: The cutest puppies. Nonstop.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter has an emergency at the practice in Kirkbymoorside, when a local farming couple rush in their pregnant Texel ewe. Julian operates on a terrier suffering with bladder stones. Peter visits the Green's farm to see a lonely donkey.

programme.title: To The Rescue
programme.desc: Tommy heads to The Bahamas in search of Potcake Dogs and help Wings of Rescue transport over 200 shelter pets from Nassau to new homes in Nova Scotia, showcasing the dedication and challenges in rescuing and rehoming these animals.

programme.title: 6 Puppies And Us
programme.desc: The first few weeks of having a puppy are probably the most challenging, and this episode throws us straight into funny and dramatic stories as our new puppies throw up a bewildering variety of challenges.

programme.title: Pet Heroes
programme.desc: A cat with an unusual job plays a key role on an ER veterinary team; a chihuahua comes to the aid of a stranded young beaver in danger.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Dog likes to eat tissue but has trouble with the tissue as it gets stuck to his face and he can't reach; Baron, the Rottweiler eats his specially baked Birthday cookies; Huskie dog licks peanut butter off spoon and keeps sticking out tongue to get it off.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Dogs and Budgie share food; dog spills soup and takes plate; the puppy falls in the dish with milk.

programme.title: Animals Unleashed
programme.desc: A dog chases deer, literal lounge lizards, plus a really cool Golden Retriever. And in our Top 5, an adorable cat tries to floss.

programme.title: Operation Dalmatian: The Big Adventure
programme.desc: What do you get when you cross a rambunctious girl, a nutty professor, a mischievous medicine man and a colorful dalmatian with a stuffy dog show? Puppy pandemonium!

programme.title: Lost And Found
programme.desc: Following the work of Dogs Trust, one of Britain's best-loved dog rescue charities, as they find new homes for unwanted and abandoned dogs.

programme.title: Seniors: A Dogumentary
programme.desc: An old dog can teach you new tricks!

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter battles to deliver lambs who are jumbled up and stuck inside their mum, and he is shocked by what he finds. Julian has to contend with an angry parrot that has escaped in the surgery. A rescue dog is attacked by another dog.

programme.title: Dogs with Jobs
programme.desc: Sarcelle: Seeing Eye Service Dog (St. Hyacinthe, Quebec) - Trained at Quebec's MIRA foundation, Sarcelle, a playful Bernese, becomes a guide dog for Eric, a 14-year-old with Spina Bifida.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: RSPCA Inspectors Kate Fletcher and Becky London join up with the police to save dogs from an owner who’s been banned from keeping animals.

programme.title: Animal Attractions
programme.desc: Our Dog Trainer, Ronald White, turns an "out of order" Beagle named Quincy into a law-abiding pup. Do you want to adopt an adult pet? We've got some tips for you.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Dog knocks over boy playing tee ball; large birds eat food off guys head; baby bounces on dog and gets flipped; boy drinks water from dogs bowl.

programme.title: Animals Unleashed
programme.desc: Polar bear basketball, a dog and a raccoon become best friends, and a Burmese Mountain dog goes sledding. And in our Top 5, a goat tries to sneak in the house.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian Norton receives an emergency call from alpaca breeder Jackie, whose prize-winning female Cinderella is having a difficult labour. Peter Wright has to castrate Larry the chinchilla who is responsible for a population explosion.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle launches her new business with the purchase of an Arabian horse. Sexual tension between Steven and Luke mounts. Jeff and Nikki return from Bolivia with the news of their marriage and they move into the mansion.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake returns triumphant from his negotiations with the Chinese. Alexis vows to buy into the venture. Krystle, uncomfortable with Daniel's increasing attention, avoids him. Blake invites Amanda to accompany him on a business trip to Acapulco.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to persuade the head of the Chinese delegation to hire Colbyco. Blake is surprised to learn Lady Ashley is an Acapulco. Amanda has a romantic fling with Prince Michael of Moldavia. Krystle makes a surprise visit to Daniel.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Amanda spends the night with Prince Michael and then is heartsick to learn he is engaged. Dex persuades the Chinese delegation to use his company instead of Blake's for an important drilling job. Claudia finally accepts Adam's advances.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Tensions between Krystle and Blake mount as their suspicions of one another grow. Claudia regrets sleeping with Adam. Dominique derails Alexis' attempt to buy out her company but is unable to stop Brady's divorce proceedings.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dominique remains in critical condition after collapsing. Luke pays an unexpected visit to Steven. Blake tells his son that he will support him regardless of his sexual persuasion. Alexis calls her former lover, King Galen, a Middle Eastern monarch.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to persuade King Galen to allow a marriage between Amanda and his son. She sweetens the offer by suggesting his country would receive a portion of Colbyco's revenues. Dominique advises Krystle to reconcile with Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is relieved and Blake is concerned when Amanda suddenly changes her mind and decides to marry Prince Michael. Sammy Jo is revealed to be the culprit behind the compromising photographs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia flies to Mexico to divorce Steven. Unexpectedly, Adam appears at her hotel and they spend the night together. After Amanda embarrasses Prince Michael at Dominique's party, his patience is exhausted and he leaves her.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake and Daniel survive the plane crash. Jeff charters a helicopter and braves hazardous conditions to finally locate the wreckage. Krystle and Blake finally clear the air and renew their commitment to each other.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle accompanies Daniel to New York for his reunion with Sammy Jo, the child he's never known. While looking through photos Ashley snapped on assignment at a rock concert, Jeff is stunned to spot Fallon among the crowd.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Alexis and Amanda emerge from an exclusive bridal salon, a car suddenly screeches to a halt and Amanda is pulled inside. A high-speed chase ensues. As Dex forces the kidnapper's car onto the sidewalk, Amanda breaks free.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex tells a devastated Krystle that Daniel Reece is dead. Steven is outraged when Sammy Jo decides to fight for custody of her son in court. Jeff proposes marriage to Ashley. Sammy Jo learns that her monies will be held in trust with Krystle as executor.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Elena confesses to Amanda that nothing happened in the bedroom with Prince Michael. Sammy Jo fits her roommate Rita with a blonde wig and has her practice duplicating Krystle's voice. Fallon has chosen a new name and heads for Denver.

programme.desc: El chef Ramsay llega a un restaurante endeudado propiedad de dos ex meseras y las cosas están tan mal que Ramsay realiza una intervención para abordar el tema del liderazgo.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: PJ's Steakhouse se está muriendo por la falta de control de la gerencia en la calidad de la comida, con un dueño un poco grosero y su esposo, el copropietario, sentados en el bar bebiendo todo el día.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay hace el viaje a Carlstadt, Nueva Jersey, para visitar Grasshopper Also, un restaurante que ha visto días mejores. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Viajando al North End de Boston, el chef Ramsay pasa una semana en Davide, un restaurante italiano mal administrado por hermanos enemistados. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Providence, Rhode Island, para visitar DownCity, un restaurante con un avance detenido por un propietario obstinado y de mal genio. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Bridgeport, Connecticut, el chef Ramsay visita el Café Tavolini. Dos propietarios indiferentes observan cómo su restaurante se va a la ruina . Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1971, John List left a note with the bodies of his mother, wife and three children in his mansion ballroom before disappearing completely. Detectives must solve the case, despite having only an outdated photograph of List.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 10 bodies turn up in Florida, one victim — 17-year-old Lisa McVey — is abducted but released. She leads police to the perpertrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, Eileen and Derrick Severs disappear from their home in a small village in Great Britain and police find evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was the single most deadly automobile accident in American history. Almost a hundred vehicles were involved, twelve people died and more than fifty people were injured. And it happened along a stretch of highway long known for dense, thick fog.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While vacationing in California, Earl Morris learns that his wife has gone missing from their Arizona home. The search for Ruby Morris involves dozens of investigators and scientists — and even the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Flu-like symptoms of a mother and her children prove to be something more serious: thallium poisoning. After the mother's death, investigators turn their attention to finding the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An infant is rushed to the emergency room with serious breathing problems. Within months, there are more than 30 similar cases. Can doctors find the cause and a cure?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Shortly after daybreak, a fire is started in a dumpster in Vancouver. No one sees the arsonist or the fire, which burns for hours in the deserted parking lot. But there's more than garbage in this flaming container.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bomb explosions rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day; this time, the victim survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy doesn't return home as planned. The investigation reveals some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, a serial bomber targets a judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Robert Sims returns home after working the night shift and finds his wife unconscious on the kitchen floor. Their son is fast asleep in an upstairs bedroom, but their six-week-old daughter, Heather, is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Honaker was convicted of rape, sodomy and aggravated sexual battery and sentenced to three life terms in prison. He maintained his innocence. After years in prison and writing countless letters, he finally found someone who believed him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend's house. She was never seen or heard from again. Rose's disappearance remained a mystery, until a tiny clue is found years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Scott Dunn goes missing, police spray his bedroom with Luminol and uncover a scene of horrific violence. Now investigators face a daunting task: proving that Scott Dunn had been murdered without a body, a witness or a murder weapon.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a Boy Scout Camp near Farmington, Missouri. Facial reconstruction aids the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: After being admitted to the hospital with unexplained bleeding, 11-month-old Chad Shelton dies. Investigators and scientists frantically search for a cause when others from the same house fall ill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The bodies of several women are found on a remote hill in California. The police get a break when a prostitute escapes and is able to identify her attacker and his automobile.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When four-month-old Ryan Stallings dies under suspicious circumstances, his mother is ultimately convicted of his murder. But months later, new evidence emerges from a startling source — his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors are puzzled when a two-year-old boy is rushed to the hospital with brain seizures and breathing difficulties. Finally, the boy's sister provides an important clue, raising the possibility of a rare syndrome.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después del desastre en la cena de la noche anterior, el Chef Ramsay le presenta a los concursantes la comida que desperdiciaron.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los catorce Chefs restantes visitan una carnicería para aprender sobre varios cortes de carne y luego ponen en práctica sus conocimientos. Hell's Kitchen se convierte en la noche en un asador.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los trece Chefs restantes sirvan el desayuno a cincuenta jóvenes futbolistas y porristas. Sin embargo, un equipo se queda sin huevos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce candidatos restantes compran en un mercado asiático y preparan platos de fusión para el Chef Ramsay y la escritora de cocina Tanya Steel.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los once Chefs restantes cocinan para un bar mitzvah, preparando variaciones gourmet de los tres favoritos del invitado de honor.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los diez cocineros restantes deben hacer tapas con las sobras. Un error de un Chef hace que ambos equipos tengan un casi fracaso.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay desafía los paladares de los equipos en una prueba de sabor a ciegas. En un servicio de cena abarrotado, la ansiedad es mayor de lo normal cuando pasan las celebridades Eric McCormack y Robert Patrick.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El resto de los Chefs deberán preparar un plato a base de cangrejos y cada equipo presentará su plato más fuerte al Chef Ramsay. Durante el servicio de cena, los equipos crean sus propios menús.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay separa a los equipos. Ahora los seis Chefs restantes están solos, cada uno preparando un plato con catorce ingredientes simples.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de un viaje a Atlantic City Borgata, donde el ganador pronto será un gran Chef, los competidores deben preparar un plato original que se servirá en el aclamado hotel.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay cocina para los cuatro Chefs restantes y luego les dice que repitan lo que han preparado. Posteriormente, se planea una propuesta de sorpresa para el menú de postres.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los tres finalistas preparen una comida para 100 de los mejores Chefs de Los Ángeles. El ganador aparece en un programa de televisión, mientras que los perdedores tienen que lavar y planchar la ropa de cama.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos finalistas deberán trabajar con un arquitecto para diseñar los espacios del restaurante para el desafío de la cena final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos concursantes se enfrentan en su última competencia de la cena final. El ganador asume el cargo de Chef en el Borgata Hotel, Casino and Spa en Atlantic City.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: After Keith convinces the team to take on a giant zombie home, they learn that it sits on one of Orlando's historic districts, which forces them to follow specific guidelines; rotten windows need to be refurbished and a wall needs to be rebuilt.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: When the team discovers a flea infested and rotten house with a sordid past, the group agrees to take on the flip. After hearing stories from the neighbors and finding stolen goods, it seems like this zombie's past may haunt its present.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra attacks a G.I. Joe convoy and steals a high-powered experimental laser to complete their latest weapon... the weather dominator. When the Joes launch an air assault, Destro uses the device, and it's stormy skies ahead for the Joe team.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. The Joe team uses an energy mirror array to counter Cobra's Weather Dominator attack on Washington, D.C. When their defense is successful, the Weather Dominator explodes in orbit, scattering its vital components across the globe.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 4 of 5. As the Island of no return battle rages on, Spirit goes one-on-one with Storm Shadow for the second weather dominator fragment. Meanwhile, in the freezing arctic battleground, both sides fight for the final fragment of the weather dominator.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: As three of Cobra's relay cubes are activated, Cobra commander moves forward with his plans to activate the fourth and final cube in the sea of lost souls. Meanwhile, Shipwreck and Snake Eyes escape Cobra's troopers in Enterprise City.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: Guardians of the Power Masks

programme.title: Guardians of the Power Masks

programme.title: David Bowie: Out of This World

programme.desc: Momma Dee's latest drama leaves Scrappy dead on arrival. Yandy takes a gamble meeting with Samantha & Kisha. Erica calls Karlie's bluff at brunch, but goes all in when she finds out Safaree isn't riding solo in Vegas.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Tears turn to gasps when Safaree brings an uninvited guest to Shekinah's Crying Tour. Scrappy & Bambi try to meet in the middle on Momma Dee. Karlie's surprise pool party makes some waves and sinks her and Sierra's friendship for good.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Grammy night has arrived and Spice's nerves are on TEN. Scrappy has the palace under siege when he finally confronts Momma Dee about her meddling. Erica's divorce saga is finally over, but an unexpected settlement leaves her speechless.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta: Run It Back
programme.desc: Join the Love & Hip Hop OGs plus fan favorites from all 4 cities as they watch back Season 1 of Atlanta. Shade is thrown as they watch Stevie J present a new home to Mimi far from the city. Mimi watches for the first time what went down in the studio.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta: Run It Back
programme.desc: A new group sit down to watch Episode 2 of Atlanta Season 1. They take a trip down memory lane as Stevie tries to make up with Mimi through song. Joseline accuses Karlie of being a snitch. Rasheeda & Kirk are reminded of the origins of "Marry Me".

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta: Run It Back
programme.desc: Tensions rise as the cast settles in to watch Episode 3 of Season 1! Mimi claps back at Karlie for calling her a joke! Momma Dee apologizes to Erica for her behavior in the past and meddling in her relationship. Things go left when Stevie crosses Erica.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta: Run It Back
programme.desc: The cast runs it back, on Episode 4 of Atlanta Season 1. Scrappy finally has his own place. The group is sympathetic as they watch Joseline face a tough decision. Things get heated when the infamous parking lot brawl between Scrappy & Stevie takes place.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta: Run It Back
programme.desc: The OGs run it back on the iconic Episode 5. Mimi takes a big step in her relationship. Karlie tries to "Louis, Prada, Gucci" her way to the top. Scrappy's health scare leaves Momma Dee yelling at Erica! K. Michelle confronts Karlie & a table is shaken.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta: Run It Back
programme.desc: The OGs are forced to reconcile their past mistakes, as Episode 6 of Atlanta Season 1 plays. Fed up with Kirk's management, Rasheeda seeks advice from a competing manager. Joseline and Mimi sit down and address their latest issue.

programme.title: Microkillers
programme.desc: Get closer to nature and deepen your understanding of our complex natural world. Filmed in the highest quality, Love Nature offers viewers powerful stories of nature's beauty and wonder from around the globe.

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: RSPCA vets treat a mother and baby koala, while rescuers capture a barn owl.

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: Senior vet Tim tutors new recruit Phil through an injured koala checkup; the team's solutions for animals plagued by the summer heat; vet Karina solves a puzzling frog case and releases an old friend who's ready to fly.

programme.title: Becoming Orangutan
programme.desc: Welcoming baby orangutan Topan, an orphan in need of a surrogate mom; 16-year-old Kasper preps for graduation.

programme.title: Alpha
programme.desc: Find out what it takes to be the leader of a wolf, deer, rhino, or lion pack.

programme.title: Big Cats
programme.desc: The lions of Tanzania are the only cat species to live in groups; tiny rusty spotted cat of Sri Lankais 200 times smaller than a lion but just as curious.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Meeting alphas who get by with a little help from their friends; the inescapable gang mentality of mating male dolphins; ant colonies' unique scents; female geladas always get the last word; wolves hunt family-style.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Celebrating small but mighty animal warriors armed with sheaves of scary weapons; admiring nutrias' stink bombs; honey badgers' needlelike choppers; black-tailed gulls' razor-sharp beaks; the killer talons on dive-bombing peregrine falcons.

programme.title: Parents In The Wild
programme.desc: Reproduction is the key to species conservation; exploring how the aim of all animal parents is to give their offspring a good start in life.

programme.title: Chasing the Rains
programme.desc: How elephants dig wells; a sudden river-filling downpour; cheetah Kuleta loses one of her cubs to lions; wild dog Phoenix faces off with a hyena mob.

programme.title: Wild Hunters
programme.desc: Much like their relatives the jackals, wolves hunt better as a pack wherein they ensure their survival together.

programme.title: Penguins: The African Chaplin
programme.desc: African penguins are unique on the African continent and fight against extinction. Despite the protection of the islands where they live, the population continues to decline and scientists are trying to prevent the disappearance of the species.

programme.title: Stars and Stripes
